An autonomous puppet is a puppet that acts on its own after being supplied a portion of chakra without being constantly controlled by the puppeteer. The first known autonomous puppets were used by members of the Ōtsutsuki clan. The shinobi world would eventually develop their own autonomous puppets with the use of Scientific Ninja Tools. Unlike most puppets, these puppets can endure most damage that would otherwise destroy common puppets and would keep going until they overheat or are completely destroyed.
